body.title: Extend audit-day — cross-day watch-for + fix-one-leave-many sweep
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/audit-day/SKILL.md: inherits day-close-audit + cross-day watch-for, fix-one-leave-many sweep, subsystem_index drift, inertia drift, TWM gaps, habit health, scan-for-rest auto-draft. Model: Sonnet.
body.description:
audit-day inherits all current /day-close-audit checks. Add: cross-file consistency (signature changes propagated everywhere); cross-day watch-for (yesterday's notes — fire if hit, age if not, expire if stale); subsystem_index vs reality; inertia tags match touched files; TWM coverage gaps; habit health (inbox TTR, slate decay, OR burn); log-rotation triggers; DB schema drift; dependency hygiene; credential scan (cross-file); simplification review across all today's diffs; test count regression; in-flight slate decay; fix-one-leave-many sweep (across the day's diffs, find changes whose call graph wasn't fully updated → auto-draft scan-for-rest tickets via T-auto-scan-for-rest-tickets logic).

Single expert lens: Process / Meta Engineer (not the full panel). Ultraview NOT at this level.

Emits per-run record. Reads watch_next from prior runs.

Model: Sonnet.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/audit-day/SKILL.md (renamed + extended).
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry.
**Test plan:** seed a day's commits with a partial signature change → fix-one-leave-many sweep catches it. Watch-for note from prior run hits in today's commits → recorded. Telemetry recorded.
